title: bulbophyllum savaiense subsp. gorumense
intro: Bulbophyllum savaiense subsp. gorumense is a species of orchid, specifically a subspecies of the Bulbophyllum savaiense plant, native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum savaiense subsp. gorumense include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or infusion form, or as a paste, to treat various health conditions, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
